channel.title: Posts on Wei Li's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Wei Li's blog

item.title: Readings
item.description: Software foundations Computability and Logic by Boolos. A Mathematical Introduction to Logic Lecture Notes on Iris: Higher-Order Concurrent Separation Logic

item.title: About Me
item.description: (关于书的贡献) I am Wei Li, an exam-exempted master’s student who majors in cyberspace security at School of Cyber Engineering, Xidian University (XDU), China. I’m a former CTF player in L-team and XDSEC. My research interest falls in securing software systems via formal methods. I’m currently studying Hoare-like logic to model programs’ behavior. During my undergraduate education, I mostly focused on CTF competitions and extracurricular activities of the information security club XDSEC.
